title: The Feminist City
summary: In onze serie 'Feminist City' belichtten we verschillende perspectieven van vrouwen in steden en hoe stedelijke planning, stedelijk bestuur en kantoorinrichting vrouwen beter kunnen ondersteunen in hun dagelijks leven.

title: Overzicht Value of a City Insights
summary: In de serie 'Value of a City' geven wij maandelijks onze visie op een onderwerp dat te maken heeft met de waarde van de stad. Deze visie komt tot stand vanuit intern onderzoek en dialoog met interne en externe stakeholders, in nauwe samenwerking met consultants en analisten uit ons Real Estate Strategy & Innovation team.

title: Italy MarketBeat
summary: Cushman & Wakefield MarketBeat reports analyse quarterly Italy commercial property activity across office, retail and industrial real estate sectors including supply, demand and pricing trends at the market and submarket levels.

title: Hotel property in Paris and the Ile-de-France region

title: Focus on Warsaw East - Praga
summary: Today, Praga is experiencing one of the most dynamic transformations in Warsaw. Its distinctive historic identity is seamlessly combined with modern infrastructure and a high standard of urban space.

title: Residential Real Estate Investor Survey 2026
summary: Structural bottlenecks in the housing market and the sector’s high resilience to economic downturns continue to make residential property a preferred investment vehicle for many investors.

title: European Luxury Retail
summary: Explore the dynamics of the European luxury retail real estate market.

title: Health of the Market – Elderly Care and Seniors
summary: After stellar investment into the healthcare sector during 2025, the geopolitical landscape has shifted investor sentiment across real estate. Nevertheless, the fundamentals remain robust across all subsectors of Healthcare.
